prompts.name: Dust Motes
prompts.text: Add subtle dust motes floating in light beams for depth and atmospheric realism.

prompts.name: Falling Petals
prompts.text: Add falling petals drifting through the scene with soft motion and natural spacing.

prompts.name: Wet Reflections
prompts.text: Add wet surface reflections that mirror lights, colors, and silhouettes realistically.

prompts.name: Floating Leaves
prompts.text: Add drifting leaves moved by gentle wind, creating seasonal motion and atmosphere.

prompts.name: Steam
prompts.text: Add soft steam rising from food, drink, vents, or warm water with natural diffusion.

prompts.name: Smoke
prompts.text: Add controlled smoke or haze with soft edges, layered depth, and believable movement.

prompts.name: Sunbeams
prompts.text: Add sunbeams cutting through windows, trees, or haze with subtle light particles.

prompts.name: Water Droplets
prompts.text: Add water droplets on glass, skin, clothing, or surfaces with believable highlights.

prompts.name: Snow Accumulation
prompts.text: Add snow accumulation on ground, clothing, rooftops, or objects with natural softness.

prompts.name: Petals on Ground
prompts.text: Add scattered flower petals on the ground with organic placement and color variation.

prompts.name: Cables and Pipes
prompts.text: Add cables, pipes, vents, or mechanical details to create a more lived-in technical environment.

prompts.name: Books and Papers
prompts.text: Add scattered books or papers with believable placement and texture while avoiding readable text.

prompts.name: Table Items
prompts.text: Add small table items such as cups, dishes, notebooks, or tools to make the space feel lived-in.

prompts.name: Lantern Glow
prompts.text: Add lantern glow affecting nearby objects with warm falloff and soft shadows.

prompts.name: Distant People
prompts.text: Add distant background figures only as soft environmental silhouettes, not competing with the main subject.
